query_normalized: predicting solubility in mixed solvents with machine learning chemistry
rationale: This paper satisfies acceptance criteria (a) and (b): it measures the same underlying mechanism (solvation free energy, which directly determines solubility) using machine learning/GNNs in the same domain (chemistry/molecular properties), even though it tests on pure solvents rather than mixed solvents specifically. Per the guidelines, a literature review paper does not need to address the full triple-intersection of the user's question to be included.
